email_text:
Subject: EU261 compensation request for delayed flight

Hello Lufthansa claims team,

Passenger: Jane Doe
Email: jane.doe@example.com
Flight: LH123
Date: 2026-02-10
Route: FRA -> MAD
Arrival delay: 3.5 hours
Distance: 1450 km

My flight was significantly delayed due to operational issues. Please process compensation under EU261.

Kind regards,
Jane Doe
